next_cycle_focus: Do not spend another cycle on the DOGE 4h continuation batch. All three branches failed the walk-forward trade-count requirement with zero trades, so the next exploration cycle should move to a different supported asset/timeframe where acceptance/expansion concepts can generate enough density to be testable.
rationale: Cycle 114 is now closed and abandoned. All three current-cycle DOGE / 4h branches produced zero trades in walk-forward testing and failed with low-trade-count flags, which means this acceptance/expansion concept family is too sparse to be a usable research lane under the current validation regime. The reflection also reconfirmed ETH channel shortbias v3 as a strong ETH/1h benchmark and a clear BTC/1h non-transfer, but that does not rescue the current DOGE batch.
